keyPoints: Overview: A Blum Blum Shub Generator is a type of pseudorandom number generator (PRNG) used for cryptographic purposes.
Key Properties: It uses a polynomial equation to generate a sequence of numbers.
Security: The Blum Blum Shub Generator is considered secure due to the difficulty of factoring large composite numbers.
Initialization: The generator is initialized with a large prime number p and a large composite number q.
Iteration: The generator iterates through a polynomial equation to produce a pseudorandom number sequence.
